pscSupersprint.title: PSC Supersprint
pscSupersprint.subtitle: Web application for managing PSC triathlon supersprint competition results

overview.title: About the Project
overview.description: PSC Supersprint is a modern web application for managing and displaying real-time results of a supersprint triathlon competition. It provides detailed rankings by category, gender and scratch, as well as individual athlete profiles.
overview.mission: This application is primarily designed for PSC Supersprint athletes, organizers and spectators, allowing them to easily track competition results, podiums and performances.

items.rankings: Rankings by category, gender and scratch

technology.title: Tech Stack
technology.description: Built with modern web technologies to deliver a fast and reliable experience:

stack.nextjs: Next.js 16 (App Router) - React framework for high-performance apps
stack.tailwind: Tailwind CSS v4 - Modern and responsive styling
stack.firebase: Firebase Realtime Database - Real-time data and administration
stack.radix: Radix UI + shadcn/ui - Accessible and styled components
stack.testing: Vitest + Testing Library - Code quality and reliability

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.description: This application is primarily designed to present and distribute results from the supersprint triathlon organized by PSC. It allows athletes to find their performances, organizers to easily manage competition data, and spectators to follow the rankings live.

cta.title: Access the Application
cta.description: Check results, rankings and podiums from PSC Supersprint online.
cta.ariaLabel: View the PSC Supersprint application (opens in a new tab)
